_metadata.description: Container runtime and launch-type constraints that AWS enforces when validating IaC artifacts. Used by generate-iac and generate-preventive skills to avoid emitting templates AWS will reject at deploy time. Hand-curated; only deploy-verified entries are included. Unknown launch types should fail loudly in generators, not silently skip.
sources: Each entry: the specific service's launch-type documentation page
_metadata.verification: Every constraint below has been validated at deploy time in at least one smoke-test cycle

forbidden_properties.reason: AWS Fargate does not support adding Linux capabilities. Only Drop is accepted.
forbidden_properties.aws_error: ClientException: Fargate launch type does not support privileged settings

forbidden_properties.reason: AWS Fargate does not support privileged containers.
forbidden_properties.aws_error: ClientException: Fargate launch type does not support privileged settings

ecs_fargate.notes: EC2 launch type supports all of these. Check RequiresCompatibilities BEFORE emitting any of the forbidden properties.
